enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Ichu Ichu is a lively and fun track that captures the essence of celebration and joy.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Vedi, the song is featured during a festive sequence, highlighting the characters' happiness and energy.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by Vijay Antony, showcasing his talent in both singing and music direction.

When was the song released?

Ichu Ichu was released on September 30, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ichu Ichu from the movie Vedi is a lively dance number that encapsulates the joy and excitement of celebration. With its upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics, it encourages listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment. The vibrant energy of Vijay Antony's performance adds to the song's appeal, making it a perfect choice for parties and weddings. Overall, it conveys a sense of happiness and carefree spirit, resonating with audiences looking for a fun musical experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ichu Ichu from Vedi is a vibrant and energetic track that showcases Vijay Antony's unique musical style. With catchy lyrics and a danceable beat, this song is sure to get you moving. Experience the infectious vibe that makes this song a must-listen for any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: Ichu Ichu Ichu Ichu, give it, give it, give it, give it, enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, is it right, right?
Achu Achu Achu Achu, give it, give it, give it, give it, crazy, crazy, crazy, crazy, is it right, right?
Like a flower, it blooms, it grows, it ripens, it becomes sweet, it becomes unique, I am yours.
Oh, this is for the girl, for her eyes, it becomes beautiful, it becomes a reality, I have come, I have come.
Keep talking, keep talking, what is it? In your house, if you ask me, I will respond, I will stay with you.
Beautiful, beautiful, from the place, the house is decorated, it has come.
The sun and the moon, both are yours, they are given to you.
With your beauty, I have kept you in my heart, it is very precious, with a small smile, what have you done? Is it a picture at the door?
Fragrance, fragrance, jasmine fragrance, it is sweet and pleasant.
For this, for that, for everything, for the fire, let it burn together.
Nourishment, nourishment, love's nourishment, half is true, half is not, don't do it.
In the eyes that are closed, is it a lie? In the girls, is it a deception?
In the kitchen, if you put it, it will be good, if you hold it, it will be seen, in the tough work, if you say this, will you listen?
Ichu Ichu Ichu Ichu, give it, give it, give it, give it, enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, is it right, right?
Oh, this is for the girl, for her eyes, it becomes beautiful, it becomes a reality, I have come, I have come.
Like a flower, it blooms, it grows, it ripens, it becomes sweet, it becomes unique, I am yours.
Ichu Ichu Ichu Ichu, give it, give it, give it, give it, enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, is it right, right?
